message:
fix(web): gate helper functions behind cfg(wasm32|test) to fix non-wasm builds

The renderer helpers (cells_to_bytes, uniforms_bytes, UNIFORM_BYTES) were
only used on wasm32 targets and in tests. Add proper cfg gates so clippy
dead_code lint passes on native targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ js-sys = "0.3.85"
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2.108"
 wasm-bindgen-futures = "0.4.58"
 web-sys = { version = "0.3.85", features = ["HtmlCanvasElement"] }
+wgpu = { version = "28.0.0", default-features = false, features = ["std", "wgsl", "webgpu"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.7.0"
